description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named performance that runs in the performance stage using the docker:stable image and the docker:stable-dind service. The job is allowed to fail, uploads performance.json and the sitespeed-results/ directory as artifacts, and is skipped when the variable PERFORMANCE_DISABLED is set. It runs only on Kubernetes active runners for branch and tag refs. The script should first check docker info and set DOCKER_HOST if needed, export CI_ENVIRONMENT_URL from environment_url.txt, download the gitlab-exporter index.js, create the sitespeed-results directory, then if .gitlab-urls.txt exists prepend the CI_ENVIRONMENT_URL to each line and run the sitespeed.io Docker container with the gitlab-exporter plugin and outputFolder sitespeed-results, otherwise run the container with CI_ENVIRONMENT_URL directly, and finally move sitespeed-results/data/performance.json to performance.json. Set the variable DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR to an empty string.
